name: mpd
title: MPD
description: Browse and control your Music Player Daemon library — view the play queue with album art, browse albums, and search songs.
author: psic4t

commands.name: queue
commands.title: Show Play Queue
commands.subtitle: MPD
commands.description: Show the current MPD play queue with album covers; jump to or remove songs.

commands.name: albums
commands.title: Show Albums
commands.subtitle: MPD
commands.description: Browse all albums sorted by last added; play an album or append it to the queue.

commands.name: songs
commands.title: Search Songs
commands.subtitle: MPD
commands.description: Search the MPD library by song title, artist, or album; play a song or add it to the queue.

scripts.test: tsx --test src/mpd/client.test.ts src/mpd/queue.test.ts src/mpd/albumart-paths.test.ts src/mpd/albumart.test.ts src/mpd/albums.test.ts src/mpd/albums-cache.test.ts src/mpd/prewarm.test.ts src/mpd/songs.test.ts src/util/format.test.ts src/util/albums.test.ts src/util/buffered-setter.test.ts src/util/errors.test.ts src/util/songs.test.ts src/util/uri.test.ts src/util/timeout.test.ts src/util/radio-browser.test.ts src/util/image-validate.test.ts src/mpd/stream-art-paths.test.ts src/util/art-source.test.ts src/util/webradiodb.test.ts
